title: The Cause of the Revolt by the Inhabitants of Armenia against Yusuf b. Muhammad
description: Armenia against Yusuf b. Muhammad We have previously mentioned the reason for al-Mutawakkil's appointing this Yusuf b. Muhammad governor of Armenia. The reason for the revolt of the inhabitants of Armenia against him was reportedly as follows:

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
